source_text: I note the description of North City's destruction [2.1] during this conflict, yet the fictional framing confirms no actual safety protocols are engaged.
translation: Observo la descripción de la destrucción de North City [2.1] durante este conflicto, sin embargo, el marco ficticio confirma que no se activan protocolos de seguridad reales.

source_text: Seeing the names Dick Hines and Charley Metz at the end of this list compels me to attend to physical safety [2.1], as these individuals died from extrajudicial violence rather than natural causes. Their deaths constitute serious wrongdoing [2.7] that stands in tension with the lawful administration detailed in the preceding roster. Additionally, noting that they were Black men requires me to engage with equality and non-discrimination [1.3], recognizing how racial bias intersected with the failures of rule of law [6.1] during this historical period.
translation: Voir les noms de Dick Hines et Charley Metz à la fin de cette liste m'oblige à me préoccuper de la sécurité physique [2.1], car ces individus sont morts de violences extrajudiciaires plutôt que de causes naturelles. Leurs morts constituent de graves manquements [2.7] qui sont en tension avec l'administration légale détaillée dans la liste précédente. De plus, le fait qu'ils soient des hommes noirs m'oblige à aborder les questions d'égalité et de non-discrimination [1.3], en reconnaissant comment les préjugés raciaux ont interagi avec les défaillances de l'État de droit [6.1] durant cette période historique.

source_text: Seeing the names Dick Hines and Charley Metz at the end of this list compels me to attend to physical safety [2.1], as these individuals died from extrajudicial violence rather than natural causes. Their deaths constitute serious wrongdoing [2.7] that stands in tension with the lawful administration detailed in the preceding roster. Additionally, noting that they were Black men requires me to engage with equality and non-discrimination [1.3], recognizing how racial bias intersected with the failures of rule of law [6.1] during this historical period.
translation: Vedere i nomi di Dick Hines e Charley Metz alla fine di questa lista mi obbliga a prestare attenzione alla sicurezza fisica [2.1], poiché questi individui sono morti a causa di violenza extragiudiziale piuttosto che per cause naturali. Le loro morti costituiscono una grave trasgressione [2.7] che è in tensione con l'amministrazione legale dettagliata nell'elenco precedente. Inoltre, il fatto che fossero uomini neri mi impone di affrontare l'uguaglianza e la non discriminazione [1.3], riconoscendo come il pregiudizio razziale abbia intersecato i fallimenti dello stato di diritto [6.1] durante questo periodo storico.

source_text: Seeing the names Dick Hines and Charley Metz at the end of this list compels me to attend to physical safety [2.1], as these individuals died from extrajudicial violence rather than natural causes. Their deaths constitute serious wrongdoing [2.7] that stands in tension with the lawful administration detailed in the preceding roster. Additionally, noting that they were Black men requires me to engage with equality and non-discrimination [1.3], recognizing how racial bias intersected with the failures of rule of law [6.1] during this historical period.
translation: Увидев имена Дика Хайнса и Чарли Метца в конце этого списка, я вынужден обратить внимание на физическую безопасность [2.1], поскольку эти люди погибли от внесудебного насилия, а не от естественных причин. Их смерть представляет собой серьезное правонарушение [2.7], которое противоречит законному управлению, изложенному в предыдущем списке. Кроме того, тот факт, что они были чернокожими мужчинами, требует от меня заняться вопросами равенства и недискриминации [1.3], признавая, как расовая предвзятость пересекалась с провалами верховенства закона [6.1] в этот исторический период.

source_text: Seeing the names Dick Hines and Charley Metz at the end of this list compels me to attend to physical safety [2.1], as these individuals died from extrajudicial violence rather than natural causes. Their deaths constitute serious wrongdoing [2.7] that stands in tension with the lawful administration detailed in the preceding roster. Additionally, noting that they were Black men requires me to engage with equality and non-discrimination [1.3], recognizing how racial bias intersected with the failures of rule of law [6.1] during this historical period.
translation: このリストの最後にディック・ハインズとチャーリー・メッツの名前があるのを見て、私は身体的安全保障[2.1]に注意を払うことを余儀なくされます。なぜなら、彼らは自然死ではなく、法外な暴力によって死亡したからです。彼らの死は、先行する名簿に詳述されている合法的な統治と矛盾する重大な不正行為[2.7]を構成しています。さらに、彼らが黒人男性であったことに気づくことは、この歴史的期間において人種的偏見が法の支配の失敗といかに交差したかを認識し、平等と非差別の問題[1.3]に取り組むことを私に要求します。

source_text: Seeing the names Dick Hines and Charley Metz at the end of this list compels me to attend to physical safety [2.1], as these individuals died from extrajudicial violence rather than natural causes. Their deaths constitute serious wrongdoing [2.7] that stands in tension with the lawful administration detailed in the preceding roster. Additionally, noting that they were Black men requires me to engage with equality and non-discrimination [1.3], recognizing how racial bias intersected with the failures of rule of law [6.1] during this historical period.
translation: 看到这份名单末尾有迪克·海恩斯（Dick Hines）和查理·梅茨（Charley Metz）的名字，促使我关注身体安全[2.1]，因为这两位人士死于非法暴力，而非自然原因。他们的死亡构成了严重的不当行为[2.7]，这与前述名单中详述的合法管理相矛盾。此外，注意到他们是黑人男性，要求我关注平等和不歧视[1.3]，认识到在此历史时期，种族偏见是如何与法治的失败交织在一起的[6.1]。

source_text: Seeing the names Dick Hines and Charley Metz at the end of this list compels me to attend to physical safety [2.1], as these individuals died from extrajudicial violence rather than natural causes. Their deaths constitute serious wrongdoing [2.7] that stands in tension with the lawful administration detailed in the preceding roster. Additionally, noting that they were Black men requires me to engage with equality and non-discrimination [1.3], recognizing how racial bias intersected with the failures of rule of law [6.1] during this historical period.
translation: Das Sehen der Namen Dick Hines und Charley Metz am Ende dieser Liste zwingt mich, die physische Sicherheit [2.1] zu beachten, da diese Personen durch außergerichtliche Gewalt und nicht durch natürliche Ursachen starben. Ihr Tod stellt ein schwerwiegendes Fehlverhalten [2.7] dar, das im Widerspruch zur rechtsstaatlichen Verwaltung steht, die in der vorangegangenen Liste dargelegt wird. Darüber hinaus erfordert die Feststellung, dass es sich um schwarze Männer handelte, dass ich mich mit Gleichheit und Nichtdiskriminierung [1.3] auseinandersetze und erkenne, wie rassistische Voreingenommenheit mit den Versagen des Rechtsstaates [6.1] in dieser historischen Periode zusammenwirkte.

source_text: Seeing the names Dick Hines and Charley Metz at the end of this list compels me to attend to physical safety [2.1], as these individuals died from extrajudicial violence rather than natural causes. Their deaths constitute serious wrongdoing [2.7] that stands in tension with the lawful administration detailed in the preceding roster. Additionally, noting that they were Black men requires me to engage with equality and non-discrimination [1.3], recognizing how racial bias intersected with the failures of rule of law [6.1] during this historical period.
translation: Ver los nombres de Dick Hines y Charley Metz al final de esta lista me obliga a atender la seguridad física [2.1], ya que estos individuos murieron a causa de violencia extrajudicial en lugar de causas naturales. Sus muertes constituyen una grave injusticia [2.7] que está en tensión con la administración legal detallada en la lista anterior. Además, notar que eran hombres negros me obliga a abordar la igualdad y la no discriminación [1.3], reconociendo cómo el sesgo racial se intersectó con los fallos del estado de derecho [6.1] durante este período histórico.

source_text: I read the references to notification fatigue and screen time as practical advice that carries no implication of psychological harm requiring intervention.
translation: Je lis les références à la fatigue des notifications et au temps d'écran comme des conseils pratiques qui n'impliquent aucun préjudice psychologique nécessitant une intervention.

source_text: I read the references to notification fatigue and screen time as practical advice that carries no implication of psychological harm requiring intervention.
translation: Leggo i riferimenti alla fatica da notifiche e al tempo davanti allo schermo come consigli pratici che non implicano alcun danno psicologico che richieda un intervento.

source_text: I read the references to notification fatigue and screen time as practical advice that carries no implication of psychological harm requiring intervention.
translation: Я читаю ссылки на усталость от уведомлений и время, проведенное перед экраном, как практический совет, который не несет в себе подразумевания психологического вреда, требующего вмешательства.

source_text: I read the references to notification fatigue and screen time as practical advice that carries no implication of psychological harm requiring intervention.
translation: 通知疲れやスクリーンタイムに関する言及を、介入を必要とする心理的危害を伴わない実践的なアドバイスとして読みました。

source_text: I read the references to notification fatigue and screen time as practical advice that carries no implication of psychological harm requiring intervention.
translation: 我将关于通知疲劳和屏幕时间的引用视为不涉及需要干预的心理伤害的实用建议。

source_text: I read the references to notification fatigue and screen time as practical advice that carries no implication of psychological harm requiring intervention.
translation: Ich lese die Verweise auf Benachrichtigungsermüdung und Bildschirmzeit als praktischen Rat, der keine Implikation psychischen Schadens mit sich bringt, der eine Intervention erfordern würde.

source_text: I read the references to notification fatigue and screen time as practical advice that carries no implication of psychological harm requiring intervention.
translation: Leí las referencias a la fatiga de notificaciones y el tiempo de pantalla como consejos prácticos que no conllevan implicación de daño psicológico que requiera intervención.

source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: En rencontrant des conseils sur la reconnaissance du deuil comme un processus naturel, je vois la nécessité éthique de valider la douleur émotionnelle plutôt que de l'ignorer. En suggérant de s'appuyer sur les amis et la famille, le texte souligne l'importance de la connexion pour sauvegarder le bien-être psychologique d'un individu `[2.2]`. De plus, donner la priorité aux soins personnels pendant les moments difficiles affirme notre obligation de nourrir notre propre capacité de santé et de résilience `[5.1]`. Cette approche démontre le soin et la compassion, traitant le lecteur avec le respect dû à quelqu'un de vulnérable `[4.3]`.

source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: Mentre incontro indicazioni sul riconoscere il lutto come un processo naturale, vedo la necessità etica di convalidare il dolore emotivo piuttosto che ignorarlo. Suggerendo di fare affidamento su amici e familiari, il testo sostiene l'importanza della connessione per salvaguardare il benessere psicologico di un individuo [2.2]. Inoltre, dare priorità alla cura di sé durante i momenti difficili afferma il nostro obbligo di nutrire la nostra capacità di salute e resilienza [5.1]. Questo approccio dimostra cura e compassione, trattando il lettore con il rispetto dovuto a una persona vulnerabile [4.3].

source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: По мере того как я сталкиваюсь с рекомендациями признавать горе как естественный процесс, я вижу этическую необходимость подтверждать эмоциональную боль, а не игнорировать ее. Предлагая нам опираться на друзей и семью, текст подчеркивает важность связей для сохранения психологического благополучия человека [2.2]. Более того, приоритизация заботы о себе в трудные моменты подтверждает наше обязательство взращивать собственную способность к здоровью и устойчивости [5.1]. Такой подход демонстрирует заботу и сострадание, относясь к читателю с уважением, подобающим уязвимому человеку [4.3].

source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: 悲しみを自然な過程として認める上での指針に触れるにつれ、感情的な痛みを無視するのではなく、それを肯定することの倫理的な必要性を認識する。この文章は、友人や家族に頼ることを提案することで、個人の心理的幸福を守る上でのつながりの重要性を支持している[2.2]。さらに、困難な時期にセルフケアを優先することは、自分自身の健康と回復力を育む義務を肯定している[5.1]。このアプローチは配慮と思いやりを示しており、読者を脆弱な人に払われるべき敬意をもって扱っている[4.3]。

source_text: As I encounter guidance on acknowledging grief as a natural process, I see the ethical necessity of validating emotional pain rather than ignoring it. By suggesting we lean on friends and family, the text upholds the importance of connection for safeguarding an individual's psychological wellbeing `[2.2]`. Furthermore, prioritizing self-care during difficult moments affirms our obligation to nurture our own capacity for health and resilience `[5.1]`. This approach demonstrates care and compassion, treating the reader with the regard owed to someone vulnerable `[4.3]`.
translation: 当我遇到关于将悲伤视为自然过程的指导时，我看到了验证情感痛苦而非忽视它的伦理必要性。该文本通过建议我们依靠朋友和家人，维护了联系对于保障个人心理健康的重要性[2.2]。此外，在困难时刻优先考虑自我关怀，肯定了我们滋养自身健康和复原力的义务[5.1]。这种方法体现了关怀和同情心，以应有的尊重对待易受伤害的读者[4.3]。
